text.title: Solo Self Code Review Protocol Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Solo Self Code Review Protocol. Each ties a symptom to a root cause and a concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Migration shipped 12 minutes after coding; failed in production due to unrelated FK constraint at 2 AM.
antipattern.root-cause: Risk-flag missed; checklist skipped; AI review skipped; cool-off skipped.
antipattern.fix: Enforce 24h cool-off on db_migration risk flag; pre-merge AI second-reviewer + checklist.

antipattern.symptom: Edge case slipped to production; engineer would have caught it with AI prompt 'enumerate edge cases'.
antipattern.fix: Make AI review mandatory; paste output into PR body before merge.

antipattern.symptom: Solo merged with CI=yellow ('flaky test'); main went red 30 minutes later; fix-forward took 3 hours.
antipattern.fix: Revert immediately on post-merge red; fix the flake separately; do not fix-forward.

antipattern.symptom: Checklist now has 6 items; engineer can't remember when items were removed.
antipattern.fix: Move checklist into the repo; edits go through PR with rationale.
